title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.25 - Adds the character's first 8 Potions (Invert, Swap, Planned, Tuned, Milkshake, Love, Protein, Vigor) and 5 Relics: Rosin (apply an extra Tuned the first time a card is Tuned), Lozenge (gain 2 Vigor at the start of each turn), Safety Net (start each combat with 1 Unvulnerable and 1 Unfrail), Cue Light (every 5 cards that become Unplayable, apply 2 Weak to a random enemy), and Greasepaint (every 5 debuffs applied to you, apply 2 Vulnerable to a random enemy). Potions/relics currently use placeholder art.
